The apartment

Comfortable, bright and made for relaxed holidays

Tranquil Retreat offers two separate bedrooms, a welcoming living room, a fully equipped kitchen and a private outdoor area surrounded by greenery.

It is a practical base for families, couples and groups who want to explore Kassandra while enjoying privacy and the convenience of a real home.

2Separate bedrooms
6Guests maximum
1.7 kmApprox. to Kriopigi Beach
100%Private accommodation

Location

Kriopigi, Halkidiki

The apartment is located in Kriopigi on the Kassandra peninsula — a convenient base for beaches, restaurants, supermarkets and exploring the first leg of Halkidiki.

FAQ

Frequently asked questions

What are the check-in and check-out times?

Check-in is from 2:00 PM to 11:30 PM. Check-out is from 7:00 AM to 10:00 AM. Please share your expected arrival time in advance.

How many guests can stay?

The accommodation can host up to 6 guests. Contact the host with your group details before booking.

Is parking available?

Yes, free parking is available at the property.

How far is the beach?

Kriopigi Beach is approximately 1.7 km away. Driving is recommended for easier access.

Are pets allowed?

Pets are welcome by prior arrangement. Additional charges may apply.
